query: sickly yellow green tint photograph unhealthy skin tone
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — yellow/green sickly tints, jaundice and unhealthy color casts

response.objective_caption: A woman with brown hair wearing a dark hat has green face paint in stripes across her cheeks, nose, and upper lip. She faces right in three-quarter profile, with another figure in dark clothing standing behind her near a blue wall and wooden architectural elements.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Shallow depth of field and soft focus blur envelop the background and edges of the frame, creating a dreamlike atmosphere. A woman with brown hair wearing a dark hat has green striped face paint across her cheeks, nose, and upper lip, shown in three-quarter profile facing right, while another figure behind her and nearby wooden structures recede into a creamy, indistinct backdrop.
